flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at American International College fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 1.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at American International College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($39.4k → $44.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at American International College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($39.4k → $44.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at American International College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).
